Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner Braunhagey & Borden Llps [Amended] Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon & Payment For Court Reporter Fee
Off Calendar May-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference)
Atty. David
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PETITIONER BRAUNHAGEY & BORDEN LLP's [Amended] Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

The matter is called. Mr. appears to notify the Court that a proposed order was submitted. NO ARGUMENT is held. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Braunhagey & Borden LLP's unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award and entered judgment thereon" is granted.

Order signed.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
